effect.species.birtd.description: Prevents all movement and spawns birt particles above the head of the affected entity.
effect.species.bloodlust.description: Prevents eating, but replenishes Hunger and Saturation through killing. Tougher mobs give more food.
effect.species.combustion.description: Wicked effect. Makes affected entities explode on death. Explosion size and block destruction increases with levels.
effect.species.gut_feeling.description: Makes affected entities' stomachs rumble and wrench, making them feel almost as if a boss was planning to attack.
effect.species.snatched.description: Grants faster Movement Speed scaling with levels. Makes affected entities taller and thinner.
effect.species.tanked.description: Wicked effect. Grants more Health, more Damage and slower Movement Speed scaling with levels. Makes affected entities wider and stouter.
effect.species.wither_resistance.descrip: Removes the Wither effect and prevents from being affected by it.
